subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath ordained assistance through His consummate wisdom and hath enjoined it upon all who have believed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل النصره فی حکمته البالغه و امر بها کل البریه الذین آمنوا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @the power of words; of speech, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @praise and encouragement
